stemHtml:
What is the formula used to calculate convergency between two positions relatively close to each other? 

Convergency = Difference in _____ and it is expressed in _____.

options.a: longitude x cos (mean latitude), minutes in latitude
options.b: latitude x sin (mean longitude), minutes in longitude
options.c: longitude x sin (mean latitude), degrees and minutes
options.d: latitude x cos (mean longitude), degrees and minutes
